content: Do you exalt with the 2 cost at the end for the 25% after all the dmg has been done vs doing it earlier for the vuln?
Earlier because it stacks sacrifice to any damages dealt after the debuff got placed

literally WHAT was that
Low HP lily + caecus wheel + enhance + 5 charges
Her 5 cost prepare card scale on missing HP
It's also considered as strike
So it scale on charge too
If you amplify lily with pandia exalt it's 3 amp which means 30% dmg bonus too
So it makes sense
Also, saya X card can give more HP to lily which can further increase the dmg of her card because it's missing HP based
